query:
ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fanvueAccessToken TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fanvueRefreshToken TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fanvueUserId VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fanvueConnectedAt TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS creditBalance INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS freeCreditsToday INT DEFAULT 5,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastFreeCreditsReset TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS monthlyCreditsRemaining INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS monthlyCreditsTotal INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastMonthlyReset TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
command:

ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fanvueAccessToken TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fanvueRefreshToken TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fanvueUserId VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fanvueConnectedAt TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS creditBalance INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS freeCreditsToday INT DEFAULT 5,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastFreeCreditsReset TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS monthlyCreditsRemaining INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS monthlyCreditsTotal INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastMonthlyReset TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
